requirement_topic.en: UN 38.3 transport and Uzbekistan entry logistics by rail or road
requirement_topic.zh: UN 38.3运输与乌兹别克斯坦陆路/铁路入境
requirement_topic.zht: UN 38.3運輸與烏茲別克斯坦陸路/鐵路入境

summary.en: Lithium batteries and power banks must satisfy international dangerous-goods handling rules for transport into Uzbekistan. Because Uzbekistan is landlocked, practical entries are through rail and road corridors, where importers and forwarders need valid UN 38.3 evidence, appropriate transport documentation, and route-level handling requirements for classed lithium battery shipments.
summary.zh: 锂电池和移动电源在运往乌兹别克斯坦时必须遵循危险品运输要求。乌兹别克斯坦为内陆国，实际通常通过铁路与公路进入，因此进口商和货代需要具备UN 38.3依据、完整运输文件以及线路级别的危险品处理要求。
summary.zht: 鋰電池和行動電源運往烏茲別克斯坦時必須遵循危險品運輸要求。烏茲別克斯坦為內陸國，實際通常透過鐵路與公路進入，因此進口商與貨代需要具備UN 38.3依據、完整運輸文件以及路線級別的危險品處理要求。

standards_or_laws: UN Manual of Tests and Criteria Section 38.3 — Lithium battery transport safety baseline
IMDG and IATA reference rules where transport mode requires, including pack labelling and SOC control
Uzbek transport handling expectations for cross-border hazardous goods

summary.en: China requires UN 38.3 related testing/documentation for relevant lithium battery shipments and applies domestic road/air references for logistics operations. In many export operations, this means UN 38.3 reports already exist; however, Uzbek rail/road entry requires local routing compliance beyond Chinese domestic filing.
summary.zh: 中国要求相关锂电产品按UN 38.3开展测试与文件管理，并在道路、航空物流中执行国内要求。许多出口企业已有UN 38.3报告，但乌兹别克斯坦经铁路/公路入境还涉及本地路线合规。
summary.zht: 中國要求相關鋰電產品按UN 38.3開展測試與文件管理，並在道路、航空物流中執行國內要求。許多出口企業已有UN 38.3報告，但烏茲別克斯坦經鐵路/公路入境還涉及本地路線合規。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 20573 series where transport-related technical handling is referenced

gap.en: The difference is mostly procedural: Uzbekistan entry channels are route-specific and importer-handled. Chinese exporters should confirm that UN 38.3 reports match shipped configurations and are accepted by route participants for rail and road corridors.
gap.zh: 差距主要为程序性：乌兹别克斯坦入境走向具有路线特征并由进口方操控。中国出口商应确认UN 38.3报告与实际出货型号完全对应，并被铁路/公路链条的承运方接受。
gap.zht: 差距主要為程序性：烏茲別克斯坦入境走向具有路線特徵並由進口方操控。中國出口商應確認UN 38.3報告與實際出貨型號完全對應，並被鐵路/公路鏈條的承運方接受。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for all international lithium battery shipment flows entering Uzbekistan through rail or road logistics under dangerous-goods handling expectations.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory in Chinese export logistics for applicable shipments, but route control at Uzbek border and inland transfer remains Uzbekistan-specific.

source.publisher: UN/UNECE transport reference documentation and operator guidance

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] UN 38.3 remains the key technical baseline and is normally already covered by many Chinese exporters. For Uzbekistan, ensure the document package is also routed for rail and road-specific acceptance and that importer coordination is in place for each corridor shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] UN 38.3仍是技术核心，多数中国出口商通常已具备此报告。面向乌兹别克斯坦时，还要确保文件包在铁路、公路路径上可被承运方与进口方接受，并对每条运输链路进行进口商协调。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] UN 38.3仍是技術核心，多數中國出口商通常已具備此報告。面向烏茲別克斯坦時，還要確保文件包在鐵路、 公路路徑上可被承運方與進口方接受，並對每條運輸鏈路進行進口商協調。
